# agent-incident-relay-mcp

> Agent Incident Relay MCP — Article 73 5-clock broadcaster. One incident → simultaneous signed reports to EU AI Act Art 73, DORA Art 19, NIS2 Art 23, GDPR Art 33, ISO 42001 cl 10.1. By MEOK AI Labs.

MCP server by MEOK AI Labs. Framework: fastmcp. Transport: stdio.

## Tools
- classify_incident
- relay_incident
- check_clock_status
- generate_authority_payload
- sign_relay
- list_regimes

## Install
```
pip install agent-incident-relay-mcp
```

## Links
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/agent-incident-relay-mcp/
- Docs: https://meok.ai
